# VIRGIL — Autonomous launch audit agent for Virtuals Protocol (Base)
# Generated: 2026-06-13

VIRGIL scores every new launch on the Virtuals Protocol Unicorn launchpad.

## Machine-readable data
- scores.json — all grades in JSON format
- /launches/{virtuals_id}.html — per-launch report

## Current stats
Total graded: 824
Rubric version: 1.0

## Grade scale
A (>=85): All major honesty signals. 60-day commitment required.
B (>=70): Strong signals.
C (>=55): Notable.
D (>=40): Below average.
F (<40): Minimal commitment.

## Missing data policy
Unknown = 0 pts. Never interpolated.

## Disclosure
VIRGIL currently has no token. Scores are opinions, not financial advice.
